seoTitle: Macquarie Park vs Macquarie Pass — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Macquarie Park and Macquarie Pass. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Macquarie Park vs Macquarie Pass: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Macquarie Park and Macquarie Pass.
heading: Macquarie Park vs Macquarie Pass — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Macquarie Park, New South Wales and Macquarie Pass, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Macquarie Pass has a lower overall climate risk score (33/100) compared to Macquarie Park (40/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Macquarie Park or Macquarie Pass safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Macquarie Park has a flood risk score of 54/100, while Macquarie Pass scores 22/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Macquarie Park scores 42/100 for bushfire risk. Macquarie Pass scores 33/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Macquarie Park or Macquarie Pass?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Macquarie Pass has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.5% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
